profil.deskripsi_bisnis: PT Solusi Environment Asia Tbk, together with its subsidiaries, engages in the manufacture, distribution, and sale of furniture products for household and office needs in Indonesia. It provides wood-based and metal-based furniture products. The company was formerly known as PT Boston Furniture Industries Tbk and changed its name to PT Solusi Environment Asia Tbk in February 2026. The company was founded in 2012 and is headquartered in Tangerang, Indonesia. As of October 24, 2025, PT Solusi Environment Asia Tbk operates as a subsidiary of Pt Asia Investment Capital.
